data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of checkpoint-by-checklist completion (tires, brakes, lights, horn). However, the evidence provided only confirms the completion of the checklist for the forklift #FL-042, which failed on the lights checkpoint. There is no evidence of a comprehensive validation for all required checkpoints across different equipment types, which constitutes a gap in the requirement coverage. The linked use case mentions the need for checkpoint verification but does not provide sufficient evidence to confirm that all checkpoints are being validated as required.
gaps: No evidence of comprehensive validation for all required checkpoints across different equipment types.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for all equipment types
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that all checkpoints for tires, brakes, lights, and horn are validated for each equipment type.
